metadata.description: Personal, battle-tested Claude Code skills — house patterns so new projects don't reinvent the wheel.

plugins.name: coding-style
plugins.description: Cross-domain language conventions, independent of any app stack. Currently: ts-style (TypeScript/JavaScript house style).

plugins.name: homebrew
plugins.description: House patterns for self-hosted homebrew web apps: shared look (halo-design), frontend (react-spa), backend (rust-axum), and the assembly+deploy orchestrator (sibling-app).
